{{Quote|Perhaps Defense Fleet Command would believe us if the Colony withdrew from Qoribu?|Leia Organa Solo|<ref name="Dark Nest I" />}}
'''Defense Fleet Command''' was a branch within the [[Chiss Ascendancy/Legends|Chiss Ascendancy]] that was charged with overseeing the missions of the [[Chiss Expansionary Defense Force|Chiss Expansionary Defense Fleet]].<ref name="Dark Nest I" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Dark Nest I: The Joiner King]]'' {{1stm}}
